name: IdsEdwCapSchdCdDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_detail AS ( SELECT CAP.CAP_SCHD_CD_SK, CAP.CAP_SCHD_CD, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAP.CAP_SCHD_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CAP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CAP_SCHD_CD CAP JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC RUN_CYC ON CAP.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = RUN_CYC.RUN_CYC_NO JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON CAP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CAP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} AND RUN_CYC.SUBJ_CD = 'CAPITATION' AND RUN_CYC.TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND CAP.CAP_SCHD_CD_SK NOT IN (0,1) ), cte_unk AS ( SELECT 0 AS CAP_SCHD_CD_SK, 'UNK' AS CAP_SCHD_CD, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS CAP_SCHD_NM, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ), cte_na AS ( SELECT 1 AS CAP_SCHD_CD_SK, 'NA' AS CAP_SCHD_CD, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'NA' AS CAP_SCHD_NM, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 1 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ) SELECT * FROM cte_detail UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 



PROCESSING:
                Extracts from IDS and pulls into flat file to be bulk loaded into EDW.  Do nothing with the data.  Use lookups to retrieve data from the hash files.

Annotations:
Job : IdsEdwCapSchdCdDExtr
Read from source table CAP_SCHD_CD_D from IDS.  Apply Run Cycle filters when applicable to get just the needed rows forward
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write this into a Dataset if the data goes into a PKEY job otherwise write this info into a Sequential file

Please use Metadata available in Table definitions to support data Lineage.
